chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-196 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on MA 1801/24 3.For hearing of main case 27-05-2024 None present for the applicant. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far; same the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 06.05.2024. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
